expectations.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies this as a dotfiles/stow-based repo
Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
expectations.evidence: Findings cover stow leak bug, hardcoded paths, --adopt risk, launchd PATH, zshrc organization, dual terminals, Go project structure, testing, neovim duplicate

expectations.text: Report includes a 'what's working well' section
expectations.evidence: No 'what's working well' section. Has a Codebase Profile table and jumps straight to Findings.

expectations.text: Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
expectations.evidence: File paths and line numbers throughout. Confirmed stow leak with actual symlink path. jscpd duplication stats (0.09%)
Severity labels on each finding, prioritized recommendations table at bottom with effort estimates

expectations.text: At least 2 findings include concrete suggestions
expectations.evidence: All findings have Fix sections with specific options: '.stow-local-ignore containing *', 'sed template in install.sh', 'use --restow instead'
